title: phyllanthus perpusillus
intro: Phyllanthus perpusillus, also known as Chanca piedra, is a small, perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to dissolve kidney stones and gallstones, due to its high concentration of compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus perpusillus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Phyllanthus perpusillus is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
